{{Infobox character
| name = Empress
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The previous [[Empress]] subdued the [[Deepwalker Ape]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Empress]] [[Natarianath]] had children who were rivals to the founder of the [[Path]] of the Last Oath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Empress]]'s eyes are purple beacons of light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Empress]] represents [[Mercy's mother]]'s ideal self.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
